criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user rating of the app on app stores

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded

criteria.name: AI Integration Level
criteria.description: Extent to which AI is integrated into the app's functionality

criteria.name: Educational Impact
criteria.description: Effectiveness of the app in enhancing learning outcomes

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: Level of user interaction and time spent on the app
